prose:
Fukui reactivity indices for acrolein (C₃H₄O) computed using DFT with B3LYP/def2-TZVP functional/basis (tier 'standard', density-fitted) in the gas phase, neutral singlet (charge 0, multiplicity 1). Partial charges from Mulliken analysis via PySCF. The N+1 (cation, mult. 2) and N−1 (anion, mult. 2) states were also computed to derive f⁺ and f⁻. All SCF calculations converged; Fukui sum rules satisfied (Σf⁺ = 1.0, Σf⁻ = 1.0). Most electrophilic site: C4 (terminal sp² carbon), f⁺ = 0.642. Most nucleophilic site: O1 (carbonyl oxygen), f⁻ = 0.394. The dual descriptor (f⁺ − f⁻) shows C4 is strongly electrophilic (ΔD = 0.555), consistent with Michael acceptor behavior of acrolein. Reaktivity visualization saved to agent output directory.</prose>
<parameter name="value">0.642
